---
title: "Clara's Website"
format: html
---

<div style="text-align: center;">

![](images/headshot.JPG){fig-alt="Profile Picture" style="border-radius: 50%;" width="350"}

<p>
<a href="files/Clara_Bowman_CV.pdf">Download my CV</a>
</p>

</div>

---

## About Me

Hi! I'm Clara, a first-year Master of Health Data Science student at the University of Michigan 
Biostatistics Department. Some of my research experiences include cardiovascular outcomes
research and analyzing wearable technology data.
